comments.author: derek
comments.text: Investigating GH013 push rejections in Tactus and Virtuus after migration to reusable semantic-release workflow; implementing auth hardening to ensure semantic-release pushes are attributed to anthusbot bypass actor.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Updated .github/workflows/semantic-release-reusable.yml to enforce anthusbot credentials during checkout and git push path resolution. Changes: checkout now uses anthusbot token with persisted credentials; release auth step clears any GitHub extraheader and forces both origin fetch/push URLs to x-access-token remote.

issues.title: Harden reusable semantic-release auth to enforce anthusbot identity
